dictionary_sections.definition: RESERVED SIGNAL CONTINUITY GAP ID1183 is a source-backed TZPID registry entry anchored by the formal relation \omega_n = \omega_0 \sqrt{1 + n^2 \left(\frac{c}{\omega R_{KK}}\right)^2}. The entry records the named mathematical object as it appears in recovered source evidence and prepares it for the locked four-page production layout.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: In context, RESERVED SIGNAL CONTINUITY GAP ID1183 is not treated as an isolated label. It is read through the nearby source passage: carriers occupy a manifold with logarithmic-helical parameterization where the radial growth exponent $b$ is fixed by the Golden Ratio $\phi$ and $\pi$. This geometry minimizes energy and aligns with the "Deepest Truth" of the universe's structure. Source: [21] [ID 1183] HARMONIC LADDER ABSORPTION SPECTRUM Canonical Statutory Formula: $\omega_n = \omega_0 \sqrt{1 + n^2 \left(\frac{c}{\omega R_{KK}}\right)^2}$ Formal Technical Dissertation: Describes the absorption frequencies of the coupled magneto-acoustic system. This keeps the dictionary explanation tied to the mathematical usage that produced the recovered formula.

These relations can be used as equation support on the derivation page after author review.
